name: Catapush
description: Catapush — reliable mobile push messaging with guaranteed delivery over persistent TCP, offering fallback to SMS when push fails.

seo.title: Catapush — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Catapush: Catapush — reliable mobile push messaging with guaranteed delivery over persistent TCP, offering fallback to SMS when push fails.

when_to_use: Guaranteed delivery push with TCP persistent connection for critical alerts
Transactional push with SMS fallback for banking or logistics apps
Delivery confirmation for time-sensitive mobile notifications
Reliable message delivery in low-connectivity regions with fallback logic

pros: Persistent TCP channel improves delivery reliability
Automatic SMS fallback when push fails
Receipts and delivery guarantees beyond FCM/APNs
cons: SDK maintenance overhead on mobile clients
Pricing higher than commodity push providers
review.verdict: Specialist pick when delivery guarantees matter — banks, logistics, healthcare — not a general engagement tool.
review.best_for: Apps where missed push equals lost revenue or safety risk
